name: Brainchip Holdings Ltd
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.1688. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.1699 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.1688, stop A$0.1436, target A$0.1700. Risk/reward is 0.05:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
